column8: There was me and there was Kate, ... party it was, and then there were two other people.
column9: Kate, ... sister I used to share a house with, has gone to work in Australia.
column10: The train ... goes to Manchester leaves from platform 3.
column11: The lady ... teaches us German lives next door.
column12: The film ... I saw yesterday was fantastic.
column13: The guy ... laptop had been stolen called the police.
column14: Every summer John goes to the town ... his parents were born.
column15: That red car, ... is in my garage now, was bought by my sister.
column16: That’s the cat ... I saw in my garden.
column17: Richard is the man ... married my cousin Janet.
column18: The young man ... lives upstairs is very friendly.
column19: I’m trying to find the poem ... was written by my younger brother.
